nodes.name: Myiagra
nodes.summary: Myiagra（Myiagra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联20种鸟类，如Palau flycatcher、Pohnpei flycatcher、Chuuk flycatcher等20种鸟类。

nodes.name: Palau flycatcher
nodes.summary: The Palau flycatcher (Myiagra erythrops) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Palau. Taxonomy and systematics Some authorities consider the Palau flycatcher to be a subspecies of the oceanic flycatcher. Alternate names include mangrove flycatcher, Micronesian broadbill, Palau broadbill, Palau Myiagra flycatcher, rufous-faced flycatcher and rufous-faced Myiagra flycatcher. References External links Photo on Flickr
nodes.shortSummary: The Palau flycatcher (Myiagra erythrops) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae. It is endemic to Palau.
